subcodes.first_line: Verily I have received thy letter, which was adorned with the remembrance of the Desired One and embellished with the praise of the Beloved of the worlds. Blessed art thou [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد فزت بکتابک الذی کان مزینا بذکر المقصود و مطرزا بثناء محبوب العالمین طوبی لک
subcodes.subjects: @duration of the Baha'i cycle; future divine revelations, @false claims to divine revelation or spiritual stations, @divine unity [tawhid] and degrees of unity, @law of pilgrimage, @interpretation of words and passages in scripture, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
